javascript

i'm taking notes as i go through tutorials, read info, and play around with stuff.

i really fuck with javascript i'm not gonna lie.

navigation

  • thoughts - where i put what i've learned.

fav resources

  • javascript.info
  • mozilla's learn JS
  • quokka.js - VSC extension

tips i've learned along the way

  1. use the hell out of console.log()

to-do list

  • fetch XML file to HTML with JS
  • make a search bar! - found out about about pagefind but also i know how to filter through items now!
  • make my own music player with play, skip buttons, and a playlist. - used in walkman mp3 player
  • have different themes that stay selected on reload - used in homepage
  • how to filter classes - used in art page
  • img modal pop up? - used in fav albums page
  • how to have stuff loaded randomly - used in music page
